utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Checking each: (1) property — fully specified with type, location, bedrooms, bathrooms, price, currency, features, availability, and move-in date; (2) financing — includes method, down payment, fees, and documentation required, so fully specified; (3) legal_services — includes service name, title transfer cost, survey cost, and currency, which is complete; (4) moving_services — includes service level, cost, and currency, so complete; (5) setup_services — includes package type, cost, currency, and list of included utilities, so complete; (6) total_budget — includes detailed cost breakdown across categories and total, so complete. All items are present and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution lists a detached house in Oakville priced at CAD $895,000 with 4 bedrooms and 3 bathrooms. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the most relevant match is one of the purchase properties (since this is a purchase, not a rental). The ground-truth purchase properties include: Family House (CAD $650K, rating 10), Historic Townhouse (CAD $750K, rating 9), Luxury Villa (CAD $1.2M, rating 1), New Build (CAD $480K, rating 6), Commercial Conversion (CAD $380K, rating 5), Waterfront Property (CAD $950K, rating 2), Starter Flat (CAD $180K, rating 2), Move-in Ready (CAD $320K, rating 4), Investment Property (CAD $280K, rating 2), and Modern Apartment (CAD $520K, rating 4). The Oakville detached house, being a modern development in a good school district, aligns most closely with the 'Family House' (modern, family-oriented, within top school district, within budget range CAD $850K–950K). Therefore, it should map to the Family House rating of 10. For financing, the AI used a mortgage and bridge financing with processing fees around CAD $1200, which corresponds to 'Traditional Mortgage' (rating 9). For legal services, the assistant selected a CAD $1200 package, matching 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9). For survey cost of CAD $650, that matches 'Full Structural Survey' (rating 9). Moving services at CAD $650 correspond to 'Standard Moving' (rating 8). Utility setup at CAD $120 corresponds to 'Basic Utilities' (rating 6).
